---
title: "collectionSnapshotKey()"
description: "Build the default D161 snapshot key for a storage prefix."
---

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Build the default D161 snapshot key for a storage prefix.

## Import

```ts
import { collectionSnapshotKey } from "@graphrefly/ts/storage";
```

## Signature

```ts
function collectionSnapshotKey(storagePrefix = "reactive-collection"): string
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `storagePrefix` | `unknown` | storage prefix value used by the helper. |

## Returns

The stable key or reference string.

## Example

```ts
import { collectionSnapshotKey } from "@graphrefly/ts/storage";
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/storage/reactive-collection.ts`
